# [Clang] Crash in `clang::Sema::ClassifyName` when calling overloaded using declarations

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/174951

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to clang-7.0 using `-std=c++20` flag.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/bjTfjrszq

## Program
```cpp
template<typename A>
class X {
public:
    template<typename T>
    void execute(int a) {}
};

class Y {
public:
    void execute(int a) {}
};

template<typename A>
class Exec : public X<A>, public Y {
public:
    using X<A>::execute;
    using Y::execute;
    void validate() {
        execute<int>(42);
        execute(42);
    }
};
```

 ## Stack Dump
```bash
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:109: static bool llvm::isa_impl_cl<To, const From*>::doit(const From*) [with To = clang::TemplateDecl; From = clang::NamedDecl]: Assertion `Val && "isa<> used on a null pointer"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Program
```cpp
template&lt;typename A&gt;
class X {
public:
    template&lt;typename T&gt;
    void execute(int a) {}
};

class Y {
public:
    void execute(int a) {}
};

template&lt;typename A&gt;
class Exec : public X&lt;A&gt;, public Y {
public:
    using X&lt;A&gt;::execute;
    using Y::execute;
    void validate() {
        execute&lt;int&gt;(42);
        execute(42);
    }
};
```

---
